tasks.label: Backup to Google Drive
tasks.detail: Stage all, commit, and push — triggers the backup workflow automatically
tasks.command: git add -A; git commit -m '${input:commitMessage}'; git push

tasks.label: Restore from Google Drive (full)
tasks.detail: Triggers workflow, waits for completion, then auto pulls — no interaction needed
tasks.command: gh workflow run pull-from-gdrive.yml --ref main --field confirm=YES && (sleep 3 2>/dev/null || Start-Sleep -Seconds 3) && runId=$(gh run list --workflow=pull-from-gdrive.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId') && gh run watch "$runId" --exit-status && git pull

tasks.label: Pull Changed Files (ITERATE)
tasks.detail: Reads ITERATE_FILES.txt from Drive and pulls only files changed by last ITERATE session
tasks.command: gh workflow run pull-iterate-files.yml --ref main && (sleep 3 2>/dev/null || Start-Sleep -Seconds 3) && runId=$(gh run list --workflow=pull-iterate-files.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId') && gh run watch "$runId" --exit-status && git pull
